stemHtml:
Determine the change in planned Trip Fuel when applying the updated wind information, given:

Average TAS: 118 kt
Trip Distance: 57 NGM
Forecast wind component: -15 kt
Actual wind component: +5 kt
Average fuel consumption is: 3 kg/NAM

What is the revised planned Trip Fuel?

options.a: 60 kg less than originally planned.
